name: INSPERITY, INC.
business: Insperity provides comprehensive human resources outsourcing solutions to small and medium-sized businesses, including payroll, employee benefits, workers' compensation, and compliance services. Its offerings include HR 360 (full-service), HR 360 Select Edition (lower-cost for middle market), and the new HR Scale solution developed in partnership with Workday.
sellsTo: geographic markets concentrated in New York, California, and Texas

exposures.sentence: Under the CSA, we become a co-employer of WSEEs and assume the obligations to pay the salaries, wages and related benefits costs and payroll taxes of such WSEEs.
We offer various employee benefits plans to eligible employees, including our WSEEs.
Emerging technologies, including AI, may reduce the need for our clients to hire for certain roles or lead to automation of tasks previously performed by clients employees.

catalysts.event: Initial client group begins using HR Scale solution
catalysts.sentence: Our HR Scale solution is under development and we expect an initial group of clients to begin using our HR Scale solution in the first quarter of 2026.
